_comment_en: Tool profiles for dynamic loading. Core tools are always available. Other profiles load on demand or auto-trigger.
_comment_ja: 動的ロード用ツールプロファイル。コアツールは常に利用可能。他のプロファイルはオンデマンドまたは自動トリガーでロード。

core.description: Basic perception and interaction. Always loaded.

debug.description: Debugging and deep inspection. Auto-loads when AI asks for console, storage, or performance data.

state-nav.description: State graph navigation and time-travel. Auto-loads when AI interacts with state graph.

delta.description: UI change tracking and pattern recognition. Auto-loads after page interactions.

advanced-actions.description: Complex browser interactions. Auto-loads when AI needs drag, hover, or select.

admin.description: Server and extension configuration. Requires agentControl.allowAgentConfig.

power.description: Advanced control (JS execution, explicit waits). Requires security.allowExecuteJs.
